---
title: "Hello, Hej, Bonjour!"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/Profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: snow
      text: "sportecostudent on Bluesky"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/sportecostudent.bsky.social
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Lance Warwick
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/proflwarwick
---


I'm an [assistant professor](https://www.ithaca.edu/faculty/lwarwick) in the Marketing and Sport Management department at [Ithaca College](https://www.ithaca.edu).

I currently teach [Sport Marketing](Sport_Marketing.qmd), [Sport Sales & Sponsorship](Sport_Sales_Sponsorship.qmd), and [Sustainability in Sport](Sustainability_in_Sport.qmd). 

My research focuses on the intersection of sport and sustainability, with a particular emphasis on consumer behavior and marketing strategies that promote sustainable practices in the sport industry. I'm also interested in [open science](https://www.cos.io/about), questions of causality, and the use of bayesian statistics in sport management research.

Outside of the ivory tower, I enjoy cycling, skiing, and spending time with my wife and our two cats, Reggie & Rosie. I'm a fan of the Toronto Maple Leafs, Toronto Sceptres, Toronto Blue Jays, Arsenal FC, and have recently got into cricket. [Current Fan Misery Index](https://www.espn.com/espn/feature/story/_/id/45344992/sports-misery-index): **70**
***
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(httr2)
library(purrr)

response <- request("https://public.api.bsky.app/xrpc/app.bsky.feed.getAuthorFeed") |>
  req_url_query(actor = "sportecostudent.bsky.social", limit = 20) |>
  req_perform() |>
  resp_body_json()

posts <- response$feed
``` 

```{r}
#| echo: false

library(htmltools)

cards <- map(posts, function(item) {
  text <- item$post$record$text
  date <- substr(item$post$record$createdAt, 1, 10)
  url  <- paste0("https://bsky.app/profile/sportecostudent.bsky.social/post/",
                 basename(item$post$uri))
  
  div(class = "card mb-3 p-3",
    p(text),
    p(class = "text-muted small",
      date, " · ",
      a("View on Bluesky", href = url, target = "_blank")
    )
  )
})

tagList(cards)
```
